bienvenue.label: Welcome
bienvenue.titre: At the heart of Alsace, in a calm and unique setting, seize an exceptional opportunity.
bienvenue.texte: La Cour de la Semeuse, in Schiltigheim, offers flexible and scalable spaces for rent to establish your business or host one-time meetings. Ideally located close to Strasbourg and the European institutions, with all the urban advantages of the Eurometropolis.

historique.label: History
historique.texte: Just before World War I, in 1910, La Compagnie des Produits Agricoles « La Semeuse » was founded in Schiltigheim. More than a century later, its historic buildings — restored, vibrant, connected — welcome a new generation of Alsatian entrepreneurs.

fondation.texte: Creation of La Compagnie des Produits Agricoles « La Semeuse » in Schiltigheim. The cooperative served the many small farms in the municipality: cows, chickens, and pigs raised on surrounding farms.

essor.texte: La Semeuse became a vital hub of Alsatian agricultural trade. The Mill, the Clock Building and the Hall were built and staffed by dozens of workers and craftsmen.

transition.texte: Growing urbanisation and mechanisation transformed Schiltigheim's agricultural landscape. The cooperative began its conversion while preserving its remarkable built heritage.

rehabilitation.texte: The premises were fully rehabilitated and renovated while retaining their original architectural character. The courtyard was transformed into a business park. Ceramic frescoes commemorating the site's agricultural history were installed.

parc.texte: The former agricultural buildings — Mill, Clock, Hall — were rehabilitated and converted into flexible workspaces, welcoming the first businesses in the service sector.

vivant.texte: 22 professional units across 3,500 m² welcome businesses in a unique historic setting, a stone's throw from Strasbourg and the European institutions.

bureaux.label: Professional premises
bureaux.texte: Establish your business in a unique setting. La Cour de la Semeuse offers 22 modular units for service-sector companies.
bureaux.decouvrir: Discover some of our current listings below:

cb9.desc: 2 large rooms each with its own door opening onto the exterior.

h4.desc: 1 office of 12 m² on the ground floor + 5 m² of shared areas including a toilet and coffee corner.

d14.desc: Ground floor: 11 m² (entrance + hallway). Upper floor: 111 m² (6 offices + hallway + 2 toilets).

h7.desc: Ground floor: 2 partitioned offices + 1 open space + 1 glazed meeting room + 2 toilets.

salles.label: Our spaces
salles.texte: Daily and weekend room rental for professional events, meetings, workshops and seminars.
salles.feature_1: With a 35 m² convivial area including a small equipped kitchen for your breaks and meals, and 2 toilets.

situation.label: Accessibility
situation.texte: La Cour de la Semeuse is located in the historic district of Schiltigheim, in the centre of this city of 31,450 inhabitants. You benefit from a calm and friendly urban environment with all the advantages of the Eurometropolis.
situation.parking: Access is made easy by a large central private car park leading directly to the premises. Many restaurants and hotels are located in the immediate vicinity of the site.

contact.label: Contact
contact.adresse: 20 Place de la Liberté · BP 70123 · F-67303 Schiltigheim
contact.succes: Thank you, your message has been sent successfully. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.erreur: An error occurred. Please try again or contact us directly.
contact.err_message: Message must be at least 20 characters long
